highlights.text: I wrote on Monday at 4pm: “My general lean is always to defer to the trend.
My lean was they could, and late day yesterday, we got a long right into the close when ES lost a major low at 6533 and recovered.

I wrote at 4pm yesterday: “We had an absolutely classic Failed Breakdown of this at 3:40PM today which was discussed above and live tweeted…My lean is that bulls need to hold 6518, 6506-08 lowest on any CPI spikes down which targets 6552, 6565, then 6578 megaphone resistance.” We saw exactly this.
That footprint, is the Failed Breakdown, and it is my core edge.

In today’s newsletter I’ll talk this, I’ll discuss the powerful combination of Failed Breakdown’s we had on Monday and Tuesday around 6456-61 that represented the institutional accumulation that got us on board for the monster 75+ point squeeze into yesterday’s highs (this is important to know), then I’ll talk the actionable trade plan for tomorrow.
6495 to 6518= a chop range with 6505 magnet.

post_title: Massive Squeeze To Close SPX Firmly At All Time Highs. More Ahead, Or Bull Trap? September 12 Plan
